/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -g -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/forge.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/forge.dir/src/vm.cpp.o -o forge  -ldl
